proposal1.heroHeadline: Brother & Co is losing 1,200 hours annually on manual proposals. Here is the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting a proposal for your award-winning services is a 5-hour task. With our AI, it's done in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each of these issues represents ongoing losses for Brother & Co.

problems.title: Time-Consuming Proposals
problems.description: Spending 5 hours on each proposal costs you 1,200 hours annually. This is time that could go toward closing more deals.

problems.title: Reduced Client Engagement
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean less client interaction. Every 24-hour delay in response translates to potential client loss.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually crafted proposals can miss branding marks. Every inconsistency can cost up to $10,000 in lost client trust.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Without instant proposals, fast-moving prospects slip away. Each missed opportunity can cost upwards of $50,000 in potential revenue.

problems.title: Overhead Costs
problems.description: Manual proposal creation requires extended employee hours. This results in an extra $20,000 spent annually on overhead.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: Competitors with faster proposal turnaround are winning. Each lost proposal is a direct hit to your market positioning.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system replaces every inefficiency described above.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, each proposal takes hours to craft. Our system generates them in under a minute.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals often miss branding elements. Our AI ensures every proposal is on-brand and client-ready.

solutions.title: Increased Client Interaction
solutions.description: Long proposal times reduce interaction. Automation allows immediate follow-up and engagement.

solutions.title: Opportunity Capture
solutions.description: Slow proposals let opportunities slip. Instant proposals mean never missing a lead.

solutions.title: Reduced Overhead
solutions.description: Manual processes are costly. Automation reduces hours spent, cutting overhead significantly.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Brother & Co's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Brother & Co around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Brother & Co.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Acme Corp's Potential with Brother & Co's Rigorous Strategy.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our tailored marketing strategy will transform Acme Corp's engagement, driving growth and revenue through strategic insights and creative excellence.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently losing potential revenue due to several key issues.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves Acme Corp's site without engaging is a missed opportunity. With a 70% bounce rate, potential customers are slipping away.

problems.title: Poor Brand Awareness
problems.description: Acme Corp's brand is not top of mind for its target audience. Competitors are gaining market share due to lack of brand visibility.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: With a conversion rate of only 1.5%, Acme Corp is not maximizing its traffic. This results in significant revenue loss each month.

problems.title: Ineffective Advertising
problems.description: Current advertising campaigns are not yielding a positive ROI. This inefficient spending leads to financial losses.

problems.title: Weak Customer Retention
problems.description: Current retention strategies are not effective. With a churn rate of 25%, Acme Corp is losing loyal customers.

problems.title: Lack of Market Insight
problems.description: Without deep market insights, Acme Corp is making decisions in the dark, leading to missed strategic opportunities.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Brother & Co offers targeted solutions to address these challenges directly.

solutions.title: Comprehensive Market Analysis
solutions.description: We will provide detailed market insights, enabling Acme Corp to make informed decisions and capture market opportunities.

solutions.title: Creative Branding
solutions.description: Enhancing brand visibility through distinct and engaging creative work, ensuring Acme Corp stands out in the market.

solutions.title: Targeted Advertising
solutions.description: Implementing targeted campaigns to increase ROI and drive meaningful engagement with Acme Corp's audience.

solutions.title: Conversion Rate Optimization
solutions.description: Improving the user experience to boost conversion rates, turning site visitors into loyal customers.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Brother & Co is your strategic partner for comprehensive marketing solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with you to ensure our strategies align with your business goals.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Strategies
whyUsCards.description: Our team applies creative and cutting-edge strategies to drive results.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: We have a history of delivering measurable results for our clients.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Focus
whyUsCards.description: Your success is our priority, and we tailor our services to meet your needs.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to your success.

team.name: Piet Human
team.bio: Piet leads strategy and client relationships, ensuring each project aligns with your goals and delivers results. He brings over a decade of experience in creative direction.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: Understanding your brand, goals, and challenges.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Creating a tailored strategy to address your needs.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Executing the strategy with precision and creativity.

process.title: Evaluation & Optimization
process.description: Assessing results and optimizing for continued success.

pricing.name: Starter Package
pricing.description: Ideal for initial brand uplift and market entry.

pricing.name: Growth Package
pricing.description: Recommended for robust growth and expansion.

pricing.description: For industry leaders seeking maximum impact.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how we can drive success for Acme Corp. Schedule a conversation with us today.

lead.company_description:
Brother was founded on the belief that there had to be a better way. We recognised the traditional agency model wasn't offering enough value or impact and a change was required.

To us that meant creating a place that offered a true understanding of our client's business, honest partnership with accountability, greater flexibility and agility and meaningful difference with tangible outcomes

…. just like a Brother should.
